response.justification: Despite extensive senior-level experience, the candidate lacks entry-level alignment: Java is only listed as a skill without project context, German is only basic (not fluent as required), and the resume reflects a senior/lead profile with no indication of willingness to start as a junior contributor in insurance-sector agile teams.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages and domains
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership in tooling
Demonstrated passion for teaching and sharing software best practices
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not fluent as required
No visible Java project experience despite listing it as a skill
Overqualified with 10+ years of senior roles, misaligned with entry-level role
